app-nav: padding: 52px 16px 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
scroll-body: flex: 1; padding: 14px 16px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center;
cover: width: 200px; height: 200px; border-radius: 10px; background: linear-gradient(150deg, #C97A2B 0%, #8A4B1F 45%, #4A2812 100%); box-shadow: 0 14px 36px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); position: relative; overflow: hidden;
cover-band: position: absolute; left: 0; right: 0; top: 38%; height: 26%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.10);
book-title: font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; text-align: center; line-height: 1.2;
book-author: font-size: 14px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin: 6px 0 2px; text-align: center;
book-narrator: font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-secondary); letter-spacing: 0.2px; margin-bottom: 22px; text-align: center;
transport: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 36px;
skip: width: 44px; height: 44px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; color: #fff;
play-btn: width: 72px; height: 72px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--orange); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 6px 22px var(--orange-glow);
time-left: font-size: 13px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin: 18px 0; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
action-row: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; padding: 0 4px;
speed-pill: background: var(--surface-2); color: var(--orange); font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; padding: 8px 14px; border-radius: 500px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
mini-progress: position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; height: 3px; width: 34%; background: var(--orange);
mini-title: font-family: var(--serif); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;
mini-ctrl: display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px; color: var(--text);
tab-bar: height: 60px; background: rgba(26,26,26,0.96); backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; padding: 6px 8px 14px; border-top: 0.5px solid var(--divider);
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; color: var(--text-secondary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600;
